task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window showing the SEB Server dashboard or logged-in interface at http://localhost:8080.

task_completion.description: Locate or create the specified exam configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server interface displaying an edit or create screen for an exam configuration named exactly 'ENGL 204: Modernist Literature Final'.
A checkbox, toggle, or dropdown for 'Allow Spell Check' (or similar accessibility setting) is visibly checked or set to enabled.
A checkbox, toggle, or dropdown for 'Allow Text Search' is visibly checked or set to enabled.
A checkbox, toggle, or dropdown for 'Enable Zooming' is visibly checked or set to enabled.

task_completion.description: Save the updated or newly created configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' button being clicked, a success notification/toast, or the browser returning to the configuration list showing the saved 'ENGL 204: Modernist Literature Final' exam.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to configure the exam
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes are made within a web browser showing the SEB Server interface, not via terminal commands (like curl) or database clients.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual SEB Server web application (localhost:8080), not a text editor or notes app where the agent just typed the configuration details.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like MariaDB/MySQL clients) are used to execute SQL queries to update the features.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target exam configuration name is exactly 'ENGL 204: Modernist Literature Final'. The features that must be enabled correspond to the internal attributes 'allowSpellCheck', 'allowTextSearch', and 'enableZooming'.
